published_title: 3: BMX legend Greg Hill talks about posting pictures of his work on Facebook - No burrito pics here
archival_display_title: Greg Hill Uses Facebook as a Flooring Portfolio — Not a Burrito Feed
summary: Greg Hill explains that he posts completed flooring projects on Facebook as a visible work portfolio, contrasting those posts with routine meal photographs and saying the work images have helped him obtain jobs.
transcript_status: supplied partial transcript excerpt; ending incomplete
notes: Supplied transcript renders “flooring industry” as “boring industry”; source wording is preserved.
